function.rulebook_notes: Performed required identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in relevant folders, and used canonical cast records for birthday authority.
function.outcome_justification: Context date is 2026-03-30. Canonical cast record /10_entities/cast/tobias.md shows birthday 1986-05-21. A cast-wide search for 05-21 found only this file, so the next birthday belongs solely to Tobias Kern.
